title: Notifications  - Update successful
scenario: Firmware update completion notification redirects to Software update complete screen when Poly Lens app is in background
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Lens app and connect a Poly Bluetooth audio device.
2. Navigate to the device's settings and initiate a firmware update.
3. While the firmware update is in progress, press the Home button or switch to another app to send the Poly Lens app to the background.
4. Wait for the firmware update to complete successfully.
5. Observe the notification area (status bar) for a 'Device is updated' notification.
7. Observe the screen that opens in the Poly Lens app.
expected: A "Device is updated" notification appears in the notification area. Tapping the notification redirects the user to the Software update complete screen in the Poly Lens app.
